title: NIQ / Tender Notices
summary: Tender and procurement notices for IC IITP equipment and services. Published on the Central Government e-Procurement portal.
body:
All IC IITP tender and procurement notices are published on the Government of India e-Procurement portal (eprocure.gov.in). Vendors and suppliers are requested to monitor the portal for current notices.

Past tenders include:
- ICIITP/MEITY/IC-28/2020-21: Optical measurement software
- ICIITP/MEITY/IC-37/2020-21: Desktop and laptop computers
